title: List Action with Line Editor
overview: An #Action Button is added to the Opportunity data list to close selected Opportunities, with a Pre-Action configured (Template Record Editor disabled). When clicked, it opens a line editor for all target records so users can remove unneeded lines, edit rows individually, or mass-edit multiple rows—then proceed to execute the action.
generalUseCase: Use an #Action Button on a #Data List with a line-editor pre-action to review and make changes—remove rows, edit individually, or mass-edit multiple selections—then run the action.
